name: ONE Presidential Mortgage
description_short: ONE Presidential Mortgage is a mortgage lender with a Virginia Beach branch offering home purchase and refinance loans through a team of 16 licensed loan officers.
description_long:
ONE Presidential Mortgage operates a Virginia Beach branch that serves the coastal Virginia market for residential mortgage financing. The company maintains a dedicated team of mortgage professionals including three members in leadership roles (Clayton Hicks, Bill Lane, and Steve Sager) alongside 13 loan officers, all NMLS-licensed. Based on the website structure and available resources, the company appears to offer standard residential mortgage products and educational content to help borrowers navigate the lending process.

The Virginia Beach branch provides direct access to individual loan officers with contact information and NMLS credentials clearly displayed. Prospective borrowers can view individual loan officer profiles, submit applications, and access tools including a mortgage calculator, application checklist, and educational resources on credit and mortgage topics. The company maintains an Insight Center with resources covering credit understanding and general mortgage education.

The Virginia Beach branch distinguishes itself through transparency in displaying all loan officer credentials and contact information directly on the website, allowing customers to research their loan officer before applying. The presence of established leadership team members with lower NMLS numbers (607861, 607864, 607865) suggests institutional stability. The branch appears to emphasize personalized service through direct loan officer assignment and accessibility.

The website provides limited detail about specific loan products, interest rates, or competitive positioning. No information is available regarding minimum credit scores, down payment requirements, loan types (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo), or refinance options. The lack of rate information and detailed product descriptions may require prospective borrowers to contact the company directly for pricing and availability.
address: 2101 Parks Ave STE 600, Virginia Beach, VA 23451

company_info.headquarters: 2101 Parks Ave STE 600, Virginia Beach, VA 23451

pros: 16 NMLS-licensed loan officers with direct contact numbers and individual profile pages available on website
Three dedicated leadership team members (Clayton Hicks, Bill Lane, Steve Sager) with established credentials
Online application capability available directly through individual loan officer pages
Educational resources including mortgage calculator, application checklist, and credit understanding guides
Loan officers with geographic reach including California number (Lexy Sigarroa: 619 area code) suggesting broader service area
Transparent NMLS licensing information displayed for all loan officers
cons: Website provides no information on specific loan products, interest rates, or current offers
No details on minimum credit score requirements, down payment options, or loan types available (FHA, VA, conventional, etc.)
Limited company background information or explanation of competitive advantages
No customer reviews, testimonials, or performance metrics visible on the website
best_for: Virginia Beach homebuyers seeking personalized service from an established local branch
Borrowers who prefer working with a specific loan officer and want direct contact access
First-time homebuyers wanting educational resources before applying
diagnosis: ONE Presidential Mortgage's Virginia Beach branch is best for borrowers seeking direct personal contact with licensed loan officers and local service in coastal Virginia. The primary caveat is the absence of rate quotes, product details, or loan type specifications on the website, requiring direct outreach to loan officers to compare offers and determine if their products match individual financing needs.
services: Residential mortgage origination through Virginia Beach branch
Personalized loan officer assignment and consultation
Mortgage insight center with company news and updates
